scripts.deploy:local: source env/.env.local && forge script script/deploy/DeployAll.s.sol:DeployAll --rpc-url http://127.0.0.1:8545 --broadcast --force
scripts.deploy:testnet: source env/.env.testnet && forge script script/deploy/DeployAll.s.sol:DeployAll --rpc-url https://sepolia.base.org --broadcast --verify --force
scripts.deploy:mainnet: source env/.env.mainnet && forge script script/deploy/DeployAll.s.sol:DeployAll --rpc-url https://mainnet.base.org --broadcast --verify --force
